The '''Imperial Freight Complex''' was an immense tower in the [[Imperial control sector]] of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]].

==History==
The freight complex was tethered to orbital satellites and was equipped with [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]] for stability. It was built to accommodate the huge military buildup, and was the endpoint of the [[Byss Run/Legends|Byss Run]]. The [[Byss Bistro]] was one of many dining establishments around it.

[[Hunter-Killer probot]]s and [[Guardian-class patrol ship|''Guardian''-class patrol ships]] were used to guard the complex.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]]
